assessment.note: Late direction changes and feeling like he missed something signal mild strain and reduced engagement; also points to a likely clarity issue worth probing next.

new_queue.label: Late changes
new_queue.name: When direction changes late, what usually got missed from your side?
new_queue.description: Drills into the specific thread he named to surface the concrete failure point behind the frustration.

new_queue.label: Energy read
new_queue.name: How's your energy been lately — separately from how work is going?
new_queue.description: Separates energy from output; avoids leading with 'is something wrong'.

new_queue.label: Pressure points
new_queue.name: What part of the work has been hardest to keep up with?
new_queue.description: Finds the concrete friction point in his current workload or pace.

new_queue.label: Expectation bar
new_queue.name: What does doing well in this role look like to you right now?
new_queue.description: Checks whether he has a usable internal model of expectations and success.

new_queue.label: Support shape
new_queue.name: What kind of support from me would actually change the week for you?
new_queue.description: Identifies the manager behavior that would be most useful without jumping to fixes.

new_queue.label: Next two weeks
new_queue.name: What would make the next two weeks steadier for you?
new_queue.description: Closes on concrete support and next-step stability without opening new threads.
